helpful: statpack relist-count cut — the 0-relist 0.8% grant rate is the right anchor for a once-distributed long-conference petition
provisioned petition full text — the QP and table of authorities alone settle the Rule 10 analysis
documents.json empty_text marker — made the BIO's content-unavailability explicit instead of a silent blank file
gaps: statpack referenced in the prompt carries no 'Segment base rate by salience band' table in this build; had to substitute the relist cut
no pro-se / counsel-of-record cut in the statpack — pro se status is one of the strongest deny signals and currently has no quantified base rate
OCR fallback for scanned filings would have recovered the 12-page BIO text
notes: Straightforward cell: a pro se paid petition from a state protection-order dispute. Provisioned inputs plus the statpack were sufficient; retrieval was 1 corpus query + 1 MCP docket search.
